documentation:
Current version of Prime POD Power Meter with model tags for enabling/disabling some points.

Parameters:
{Container} - Combined with device to create device name on Top Server
{description} - Meta data for device description, will be calculated based on device name if not provided
{device} - Combined with Container to create device name on Top Server
{enableGenModelPoint} - Enables(1)/disables(0) Gen_PM_Model for some automatic parameter configuration
{enableMBBModelPoint} - Enables(1)/disables(0) MBB_PM_Model for some automatic parameter configuration
{enableUTLModelPoint} - Enables(1)/disables(0) UTL_PM_Model for some automatic parameter configuration
{floor} - Meta data for indicating the floor the device is located on
{hasGround} - Enables(1)/disables(0) Amps_G, can be automatically configured by model points
{hasNeutral} - Enables(1)/disables(0) Amps_N, can be automatically configured by model points
{location} - Meta data for indicating the location based on master grid location
{opcServer} - OPC Server housing the device
{parent} - Combined with suffix to create Top Server Channel
{plcName} - Name of the PLC located between the device and Top Server Channel
{room} - Meta data for indicating the room the device in located in
{suffix} - Combined with parent to create Top Server Channel
name: PowerMeterPOD_Model1_v3_1
